currentlyReading.title: The Economist as Engineer: Game Theory, Experimentation, and Computation in Economics

fascinating.title: Platform Competition in Two-Sided Markets
fascinating.whatLearned: platform competition in two-sided markets is a complex and dynamic process that involves multiple factors, including network effects, pricing strategies, and user behavior.

fascinating.title: The Market for Lemons
fascinating.whatLearned: information assymetry can lead to market failure, as buyers may be unwilling to pay a fair price for a product if they cannot accurately assess its quality.
